# Suspicious Activity

The account security protocol includes measures against suspicious activity, specifically when sign-in attempts are made from unrecognised locations. In such cases, the account is temporarily locked, and the customer receives a verification email to the registered address. The lock is lifted once the customer confirms their activity via the email or resets their password using a trusted device.

[Source: account_security.md#suspicious-activity]
